what_this_is: Authored teaching fixtures for Lesson 11. Each file is a single response in the exact Anthropic Messages API wire shape. These were HAND-WRITTEN to teach validation and retry logic offline; they are NOT recordings of live API calls, and the token counts are plausible estimates, not measured usage.

headlines.style: economic-news-STYLE wording, authored for teaching; not real quotations

fixtures.index: index.json maps the exact headline text -> ordered list of response files

malformed_kinds_included: valid JSON with surrounding prose (h08 a1)
confidence out of the 0..1 range (h20 a1)
category outside the allowed set (h19 a3, h20 a2)

pinned_reference_run.note: A correct solution (MAX_ATTEMPTS=3) reproduces these exactly.
